headline: Money Is Quietly Rotating Out of the AI Trade. These 3 Unexpected Stocks Just Hit All-Time Highs.
summary: While the market's high-flying tech trade pulls back, a handful of familiar consumer names are quietly setting records that stretch back decades.

headline: Ross Stores, Inc. (ROST) Hits Fresh High: Is There Still Room to Run?
summary: Ross Stores (ROST) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

headline: The TJX Companies Hits 52-Week High: Is the Stock Still Worth Buying?
summary: TJX hits a 52-week high as off-price strength, strong traffic and global expansion support growth, but costs and macro risks remain in focus.
